decision-tree.root-question: Do the inputs satisfy the methodology's Applies-If preconditions (all hold) AND no Skip-If kills it?

branch.question: Is the target output shape (defined in 02-output-contract.xml) known and produceable from the given inputs?

branch.conclusion: Run the methodology. Use the procedure in 04-procedure.xml (when present) or apply the rules in 01-core-rules.xml directly.
Block. Resolve the missing input artifact named in Prerequisites before re-running.
Skip this methodology. Route to a different one (named in Related) whose preconditions DO match.

example.p: Inputs satisfy Applies-If (all three checks pass), no Skip-If trips, output shape (a) producible → run methodology.
